name: Chasing the Rains
overview: Featuring an in-depth look at wildlife that struggle to survive through cycles of drought and dramatic rainfall, the series was filmed beyond the jagged peaks of Mount Kenya, in the great rangelands of the north, beginning at the end of the long rains, when river valleys, plains and mountains are flushed with new growth.

trailers.title: Chasing the Rains Official Trailer | Premieres April 22 | BBC America
